input_summary.subject: Re: Project Kickoff Call - GlobalTech Partnership

events.title: Project Kickoff Call - GlobalTech Partnership
events.description: Project kickoff call for GlobalTech Partnership. Date: Monday, February 10, 2026. Time: 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM PST. Virtual meeting via Microsoft Teams. Join link: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/xyz123. Meeting ID: 456 789 0123. Passcode: kickoff. Dial-in: +1 (800) 555-0199, Conference ID: 789 456#. Attendees: GlobalTech (James Wong, Sarah Kim, Michael Chen), Your Team (TBD). Agenda: 1. Introductions (10 min), 2. Project scope review (30 min), 3. Timeline and milestones (20 min), 4. Q&A and next steps (30 min). Please send attendee list by Friday.

importance.description: Event importance: 'action_required' for closures, schedule changes, deadlines the user must act on; 'fyi' for themed days, birthdays, informational items that are nice to know
